title: Design implement and qualify project review

limits.new_production_dependencies: forbidden unless the approved design requires an accessibility-safe primitive unavailable in the existing stack
limits.architecture_changes: forbid authority, trust, provider and persistence redesign during presentation implementation
limits.external_effects: forbidden during design and UI qualification; live Codex qualification is a bounded read/write test against a disposable local fixture

stop_conditions: owner has not approved the editable Figma review flow before renderer implementation
fixture or placeholder evidence appears as live project state
ordinary review requires raw logs or technical protocol knowledge
native Windows behavior diverges materially from the approved design
required test fails after two bounded repair attempts
